title: Cloud + AI: The Builder's Playbook
purpose: Inspire students to build with AI + AWS

slides.title: Cloud + AI: The Builder's Playbook
slides.subtitle: Strategies for What Comes Next in Cloud Engineering

props.markdown:
**Dhaval Nagar** — AWS Hero | Founder, AppGambit

AWS Student Community Day | CHARUSAT University

slides.summary: AI is your superpower -- two columns comparing what AI does vs what you do
slides.title: AI is Your New Superpower

items: Parse logs and create alert rules
Write the docs you'd never get to
Solve problems no one else sees
Ship ideas in days, not months

slides.speakerNotes: Emphasize the positive -- AI frees you up.

slides.summary: Comparison table: AI handles vs you bring vs together
slides.title: AI + You = Superpowers

slides.summary: AWS has your back -- $200 free credits + programs
slides.title: AWS Has Your Back
slides.speakerNotes: All of this is free. The only cost is your time.

slides.summary: No more excuses -- challenge the audience to build something real
slides.title: You have...

items: AI that writes production code for you
Kiro, Q Developer, Copilot — all free tiers
$200 in AWS credits, free labs, free courses
A global community of builders to learn from

props.text:
...and you're going to build another TODO app?
Or spend that time scrolling instead of shipping?
No generation before you had these tools for free. The only thing between you and something meaningful is deciding to start.

slides.speakerNotes: Pause after the TODO app line. Let it land.

slides.summary: Mission -- three action steps for the audience
slides.title: Your Mission

steps.title: Experiment this week
steps.desc: Sign up for AWS Free Tier. Try Kiro IDE. Build something — anything.

steps.title: Solve a real problem
steps.desc: Pick something your campus, family, or community needs.

steps.title: Share what you learn
steps.desc: GitHub, Blog, LinkedIn. Teaching others is the fastest way to grow.

props.text: The world needs builders who understand real problems. That's you. Go build.

slides.speakerNotes: End with energy. This is the call to action.
